label: eBooks
description: Digital books — read on any device after instant download.

label: PDF Guides
description: Shorter, focused PDF guides — practical and narrowly scoped, distinct from a full-length eBook.

label: Templates
description: Spreadsheets, worksheets, and planning documents you fill in yourself.

label: Spreadsheets
description: Structured, formula-driven workbooks — more involved than a fill-in template, e.g. a budgeting or projection tool.

label: Premium Reports
description: In-depth, research-backed writeups on a single topic — more detailed than a blog article, sold rather than free.
